tools.Name: Deep-Live-Cam
tools.Description: A real-time face-swapping tool that enables one-click deepfakes using only a single image.
tools.Use_Case: Creating engaging video content, animating custom characters, and real-time live streaming replacements.

tools.Name: Claude Skills
tools.Description: A comprehensive library of over 200 production-ready skills and agent plugins designed to extend the capabilities of AI coding agents like Claude Code, Cursor, and Aider.
tools.Use_Case: Enhancing AI coding agents with domain-specific expertise in engineering, marketing, compliance, and C-level advisory.

tools.Name: Chandra OCR
tools.Description: A state-of-the-art OCR model that converts images and PDFs into structured formats like Markdown, HTML, or JSON while maintaining layout integrity.
tools.Use_Case: Extracting data from complex tables, forms, and handwritten documents across 90+ languages.
